name: Creatine Monohydrate
purpose: Increases ATP availability in neurons, improves logical reasoning and working memory, especially under sleep deprivation
notes: Loading phase optional. Benefits accumulate over 2-4 weeks.

name: L-Theanine + Caffeine
purpose: Promotes alpha brain waves for deep focus without jitters. L-Theanine smooths caffeine's anxiogenic effects, enabling calm concentration
notes: Ideal for tournament play. Avoid after 4pm to protect sleep.

name: Omega-3 (DHA)
purpose: Essential for neuronal membrane fluidity and synaptic processing speed. Supports long-term cognitive health
notes: Choose high-purity supplements. Effects build over months.

name: Bacopa Monnieri
purpose: Facilitates dendritic communication, supports long-term memory consolidation. Useful for memorizing complex pawn structures and endgame theory
notes: Requires 8-12 weeks for full effect. May cause mild GI discomfort initially.

name: Magnesium (Glycinate/Threonate)
purpose: Reduces excessive neuronal excitability after intense games. Promotes restorative sleep and muscle relaxation
notes: Threonate form (Magtein) has best brain penetration. Glycinate best for sleep.

name: Vitamin B12 (Methylcobalamin)
purpose: Critical for nervous system function and sustained attention. Deficiency directly impairs problem-solving capacity
notes: Especially important for plant-based diets. Sublingual form has better absorption.

name: Vitamin D3
purpose: Supports cognitive function, mood regulation, and immune resilience during tournament travel
notes: Test blood levels before supplementing. Pair with K2 for optimal absorption.
